title: This. Changes. Everything.
text: Challenge the way you think about option trading. Choose an instrument that could offer you MORE: more control over risk and more profitability at the same time*. Choose Digital Options today!
subtitle:
We are proud to unveil our newest trading instrument
- The Digital Options.

item-1.title:
Higher
profitability*
item-1.text: Up to 900%** of profit  in case of sharp price  movements in your favor

item-2.title:
More
flexibility*
item-2.text: Sell the option at any point to secure profit

item-3.title:
Lower
risk*
item-3.text: Varied strike price options allow for lower risk

note: Let us know what you think of Digital Options, so we can make it perfect for you.
asterisk-1: *Compared to our regular Binary Options offering
asterisk-2: **Amount credited only in case of a successful prediction.

b-vs-c.text-1: Binary and Classic options are trading instruments with their unique sets of strengths and weaknesses. Only when all of those peculiarities are taken into account can either be traded effectively.

line-1.left: Ideal for reacting to sudden price changes

line-3.right: Unlimited profitability in case of a successful prediction

line-5.left: Offers FX-assets, indices, commodities,  and several stock-based options
line-5.right: Stock options from the FTSE 500 Index: world-famous brands and industry leaders

b-vs-c.text-2: As you can see, Binary options work perfectly when you’re expecting a short-term price spike, following a news release or an earnings report. However, if you’re banking on a slow but steady growth from a company, nothing beats Classic Options both in terms of profitability and the flexibility with which you can invest.
b-vs-c.text-3: Ready to apply the new knowledge to trading?
